name: ShopEase E-Commerce Platform
desc: A full-featured e-commerce web application built with Vue.js frontend and FastAPI backend, connected to a PostgreSQL database. Features include cart management, secure checkout, product catalog, order tracking, and an admin dashboard for inventory control.

name: DevTask Manager
desc: A desktop productivity application for developers to manage tasks, sprints and code snippets. Built with Python featuring a clean interface, configurable schedule, and PostgreSQL backend for cross-device sync and data persistence.

name: Pixel Forge Portfolio
desc: A handcrafted single-page portfolio with dynamic project loading, parallax scrolling effects, light theme, and JSON-based project management. Fully responsive with advanced scroll animations and no backend required.

name: RestaurantHub Admin Dashboard
desc: A real-time restaurant management dashboard built with Vue.js and FastAPI. Includes menu management, table reservations, live order tracking and analytics charts powered by PostgreSQL data storage.

name: LandingPro Builder
desc: A responsive marketing landing page builder template system with pixel-perfect design, smooth scroll animations, a visual section builder, and form integration ready for production deployment.

name: FileSync Desktop Tool
desc: A cross-platform desktop file sync and backup utility built with Python. Features configurable schedules, encrypted cloud upload, and PostgreSQL logging of all sync histories for audit trails.
